mols

(/moleculizer-input/model/mols)

Mols are constituents of complexes, so that in this version of Moleculizer, they represent simple proteins (i.e. not complexes.) But a mol is not itself a species; only the complexes of which they are constituents are. The species of a simple protein is modeled as the complex just containing the one mol corresponding to the simple protein. Thus, we avoid having two ways of representing these simple species.

More...
